reviews.comment:
Los surtidores de combustible  tienen los infladores para las ruedas al lado lo que hace que si un usuario necesita controlar sus cubiertas demore a quienes lo siguen.

(Translated by Google)
The fuel pumps have the tire inflators next to them, which means that if a user needs to check their tires, it delays those who follow them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVM0xtUUpREAE

reviews.comment:
Me adheri porque me informó una empleada de que el servicio de gruas y kilometraje era ilimitado y resulta que ya habiendo pagado me entero que por adherirse solo tiene 70 km cosa que no me sirve para nada, pero cómo ya pagué por dos meses y uno bonificado, esperaré y me daré de baja.

(Translated by Google)
I signed up because an employee told me that the towing and mileage service was unlimited, but after paying I find out that the subscription only includes 70 km, which is useless to me. However, since I already paid for two months and one bonus month, I'll wait and cancel my subscription.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVelBLak13EAE
